subject: TATAMOTORS: JLR Range Rover launch + India PV gains; upgrading to Buy, PT ₹1,080
bodyText: We upgrade TATAMOTORS to Buy with a 12-month price target of ₹1,080 (prior ₹960). New Range Rover launches drive JLR margin recovery and India PV share gains continue on Punch / Nexon EV / Harrier momentum. Full note attached.
